headline: Asia wants more U.S. oil and gas to reduce Middle East dependence after Iran war, Burgum says
summary: Japan, South Korea and Taiwan rely heavily on exports through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Sempra, Raises Price Target to $115
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Shahriar Pourreza   maintains Sempra (NYSE:SRE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $113 to $115.
